eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Boulder, CO; at 03:46 PM ON FEB 4, 2026 Effective until 04:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is the Boulder County Sheriff's Office Emergency Notification System. At 15:46:05 on 02-04-2026, we are requesting the public's assistance in locating a missing At-risk Juvenile. Missing juvenile male, last known to be in the area of South Boulder Road and S 68th St. If located, please call Boulder County Communications at 303-441-4444 ext 2.

For updates, monitor https://tinyurl.com/BOCOAlert. Please do not call 9-1-1 unless you are in danger. Thank you.
